flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at CUNY Medgar Evers College fell 55% between 2021 and 2024 (18.7% → 8.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at CUNY Medgar Evers College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.4k vs 4.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at CUNY Medgar Evers College rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.2k → $11.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at CUNY Medgar Evers College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8k → 3.2k).
